decision_context: Keep-vs-return the RTX 3090 and choose local-vs-cloud / which model for the structured-extraction workload, scored per named sweep against the codex reference.

axes.swing_rationale: Correctness is the purpose of the instrument; moving a provider from wrong to reference-matching classification changes the decision more than any other axis (qwen3:8b showed 85% depth / 16% accuracy).
A provider that cannot finish the workload reliably cannot be trusted with it, independent of how good its successful items are.
A reproducible verdict built on separated axes is the deliverable that the Goal actually consumes; a non-reproducible verdict has little decision value even with good measurements.
Fill-on-success matters for catalog usefulness, but only after reliability and correctness; rich-but-wrong output is penalised by accuracy, not rewarded here.
Latency per item drives operator experience and the local-vs-cloud economics, but a fast wrong answer is worthless, so speed sits below accuracy and reliability.

mandatory_gates.statement: No raw personal chat content leaves the machine: every cloud-provider bundle must pass the --scrub-cloud redaction gate before any off-machine call.
mandatory_gates.evidence_rule: summarize log shows scrub_hits recorded and provider in CLOUD_PROVIDERS was scrubbed; local Ollama path makes no off-machine call.

mandatory_gates.statement: Extraction is lossless: 0 skipped / 0 errors and the content-coverage test is green before any verdict is scored.
mandatory_gates.evidence_rule: extract log counts (added/skipped/errors) and a passing content-coverage test.

mandatory_gates.statement: A provider's outputs must be schema-valid JSON (after enforced format=json + bounded retry) for its accuracy/depth to count; otherwise its quality axes are capped.
mandatory_gates.evidence_rule: per-item parse status in the trace; coercion-to-empty does not count as valid.

confidence_policy: Report n (comparable items) per sweep; a single favourable sweep does not establish durable attainment — 100 is scoped to the named sweep, window, and geometry version.
